data.summary: The evidence provided does not sufficiently confirm whether the requirement for remote visibility through a classroom camera/mic setup is satisfied.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 'Classroom camera/mic setup for remote visibility', but the evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the actual setup of the camera and microphone. While the linked use case mentions the need for remote visibility, it does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation or functionality of the camera/mic setup. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to assert a hard requirement failure.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the existence or functionality of the classroom camera/mic setup.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify camera/mic setup for remote visibility
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the camera and microphone are operational and configured for remote participants.
